description: DevOpsAgent is the Schema for the devopsagents API

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.

compositeDeletePolicy.description: CompositeDeletePolicy defines the deletion policy for the Composite Resource this Claim creates.

agentSpaceName.description: Name of the DevOps Agent Space.

agentSpaceDescription.description: Optional description for the Agent Space.

awsAccountId.description: 12-digit AWS account ID to register as monitor account.

agentSpaceRoleArn.description: ARN of the IAM role DevOps Agent assumes to access this account.

operatorRoleArn.description: ARN of the IAM role granting web app (operator) access.

tags.description: Additional tags to apply to the Agent Space.

agentSpaceId.description: ID of the created Agent Space (populated after creation).

agentSpaceArn.description: ARN of the created Agent Space.

associationId.description: ID of the monitor account Association.

agentSpaceReady.description: True once the Agent Space is provisioned and its ID is available.
